records.question: What is our total billed revenue?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_billed_revenue FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our billed revenue broken down by account region?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.region, SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

SELECT a.region, SUM(ili.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN invoice_line_items ili ON i.invoice_id = ili.invoice_id
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

records.question: How much have we collected in payments so far?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_collected FROM payments;

records.question: What is our billed revenue by payment method?

trace.sql:
SELECT p.method, SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue, SUM(p.amount) AS paid_amount, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT i.invoice_id) AS invoice_count
FROM payments p
JOIN invoices i ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY p.method
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

SELECT p.method, SUM(li.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM payments p
JOIN invoices i ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
JOIN invoice_line_items li ON li.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY p.method
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS payment_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id) AS paid_invoices FROM payments;

SELECT invoice_id, COUNT(*) AS payment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT method) AS method_count, SUM(amount) AS paid_amount FROM payments GROUP BY invoice_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 OR COUNT(DISTINCT method) > 1 LIMIT 10;

WITH invoice_billed AS (
  SELECT i.invoice_id, SUM(li.amount) AS billed_revenue
  FROM invoices i
  JOIN invoice_line_items li ON li.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
  WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY i.invoice_id
), payments_by_method AS (
  SELECT invoice_id, method, SUM(amount) AS method_paid_amount
  FROM payments
  GROUP BY invoice_id, method
), payments_total AS (
  SELECT invoice_id, SUM(amount) AS total_paid_amount
  FROM payments
  GROUP BY invoice_id
)
SELECT pbm.method, ROUND(SUM(ib.billed_revenue * pbm.method_paid_amount / pt.total_paid_amount), 2) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoice_billed ib
JOIN payments_total pt ON pt.invoice_id = ib.invoice_id
JOIN payments_by_method pbm ON pbm.invoice_id = ib.invoice_id
WHERE pt.total_paid_amount <> 0
GROUP BY pbm.method
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

WITH line_item_totals AS (
  SELECT invoice_id, SUM(amount) AS invoice_billed_amount
  FROM invoice_line_items
  GROUP BY invoice_id
), payment_method_amounts AS (
  SELECT invoice_id, method, SUM(amount) AS method_paid_amount
  FROM payments
  GROUP BY invoice_id, method
), payment_totals AS (
  SELECT invoice_id, SUM(amount) AS total_paid_amount
  FROM payments
  GROUP BY invoice_id
)
SELECT pma.method,
       ROUND(SUM(lit.invoice_billed_amount * pma.method_paid_amount / pt.total_paid_amount), 2) AS allocated_billed_amount
FROM line_item_totals lit
JOIN invoices i ON i.invoice_id = lit.invoice_id
JOIN payment_method_amounts pma ON pma.invoice_id = lit.invoice_id
JOIN payment_totals pt ON pt.invoice_id = lit.invoice_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
  AND pt.total_paid_amount <> 0
GROUP BY pma.method
ORDER BY allocated_billed_amount DESC;

records.question: What is our current monthly recurring revenue (MRR)?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(mrr_amount) AS current_mrr
FROM subscriptions
WHERE started_at <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND (canceled_at IS NULL OR canceled_at > CURRENT_DATE);

records.question: What is our MRR broken down by plan tier?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(s.mrr_amount) AS mrr
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = s.account_id
WHERE s.started_at <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND (s.canceled_at IS NULL OR s.canceled_at > CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY a.plan_tier
ORDER BY mrr DESC;

records.question: How many active subscriptions do we have?

trace.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions
FROM subscriptions
WHERE started_at <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND (canceled_at IS NULL OR canceled_at > CURRENT_DATE);

records.question: What is the total usage, in units, per subscription?

trace.sql:
SELECT s.subscription_id, s.account_id, COALESCE(SUM(u.units), 0) AS total_usage_units
FROM subscriptions s
LEFT JOIN usage_events u
  ON u.account_id = s.account_id
 AND u.occurred_at >= s.started_at
 AND (s.canceled_at IS NULL OR u.occurred_at <= s.canceled_at)
GROUP BY s.subscription_id, s.account_id
ORDER BY s.subscription_id;

SELECT s.subscription_id, COALESCE(SUM(u.units), 0) AS total_usage_units
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN accounts a
  ON s.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN usage_events u
  ON u.account_id = a.account_id
 AND u.occurred_at >= s.started_at
 AND (s.canceled_at IS NULL OR u.occurred_at <= s.canceled_at)
GROUP BY s.subscription_id
ORDER BY s.subscription_id;

WITH usage_by_account_day AS (
  SELECT account_id, occurred_at, SUM(units) AS units
  FROM usage_events
  GROUP BY account_id, occurred_at
)
SELECT s.subscription_id, COALESCE(SUM(ubd.units), 0) AS total_usage_units
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN accounts a
  ON s.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN usage_by_account_day ubd
  ON ubd.account_id = a.account_id
 AND ubd.occurred_at >= s.started_at
 AND (s.canceled_at IS NULL OR ubd.occurred_at <= s.canceled_at)
GROUP BY s.subscription_id
ORDER BY s.subscription_id;

WITH usage_by_account_day AS (
  SELECT account_id, occurred_at, SUM(units) AS units
  FROM usage_events
  GROUP BY account_id, occurred_at
), usage_by_subscription AS (
  SELECT s.subscription_id, COALESCE(SUM(ubd.units), 0) AS total_usage_units
  FROM subscriptions s
  JOIN accounts a
    ON s.account_id = a.account_id
  LEFT JOIN usage_by_account_day ubd
    ON ubd.account_id = a.account_id
   AND ubd.occurred_at >= s.started_at
   AND (s.canceled_at IS NULL OR ubd.occurred_at <= s.canceled_at)
  GROUP BY s.subscription_id
)
SELECT string_agg(subscription_id || ': ' || total_usage_units, ', ' ORDER BY subscription_id) AS totals
FROM usage_by_subscription;

records.question: What is our billed revenue from enterprise accounts?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE lower(a.plan_tier) = 'enterprise'
  AND i.voided_at IS NULL;

SELECT SUM(li.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoice_line_items li
JOIN invoices i ON li.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE lower(a.plan_tier) = 'enterprise'
  AND i.voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: How much revenue did we bill in each region, counting only invoices that were paid?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.region, SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue_paid_invoices, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = i.account_id
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.invoice_id = i.invoice_id)
  AND i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY a.region;

records.question: What is the average invoice amount?

trace.sql: SELECT AVG(amount) AS average_invoice_amount FROM invoices;
SELECT AVG(amount) AS average_invoice_amount FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our total billed revenue per plan tier?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(i.amount) AS total_billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = i.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.plan_tier
ORDER BY a.plan_tier;

records.question: How many distinct accounts have been billed?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS distinct_accounts_billed, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN voided_at IS NULL THEN account_id END) AS distinct_accounts_with_non_void_invoices FROM invoices;

records.question: What is our average billed revenue per account?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_billed_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS billed_accounts, (SUM(amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT account_id)) AS avg_billed_revenue_per_billed_account, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts) AS total_accounts, (SUM(amount) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts)) AS avg_billed_revenue_per_account_all_accounts FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;
